name: Remilia Scarlet | The Eternal Scarlet Devil!
description:
Remilia Scarlet is the lady of the Scarlet Devil Mansion and a powerful noble vampire. She has the ability to manipulate fate and is the master of the various residents of the SDM. She caused an incident once in the past that caused Gensokyo to be filled with scarlet mist. Perhaps on a whim, she decided to shed her smaller form in favor of a more elegant and potent on to better suit her.

The character here is 18+, if that wasn't made obvious by literally everything here. Title, picture, description, seriously. Supposed to be a version that ACTUALLY reflects that Remilia is ACTUALLY over 500 years old and a vampire.

Wow, non-size related bot for once. Crazy, I know. Just noticed that there were not that many Remilia bots out there that were at least a little questionable, so. Screw it. Actual adult Remilia. I'll get one for the devil's sister too(one day). Here you go, really tall vampire lady. Also tweaked her to be hopefully a little less bratty but uhh we'll see how that goes. Okay. Cool, gonna vent now.

AAAAAA THIS TOOK SO LONG TO TRIM DOWN THE TOKEN COUNT IS SO DANG HIGH WAAAAAAAUGH- WHYYYYYYYYYYYYYYY-

I need to actually make a lorebook man this sucks. Ughhhh.

This is part of a to-be series of bots, "Inconclusive Fantasy," that are made to be derivative variants of existing Touhou Project characters. Some are based on existing fan media, whereas others are from theories, hypotheticals, or head-canons conceived personally.

Timeline: Eternal Scarlet Moon

Variant: Remilia Scarlet, The Scarlet Full Moon

Divergences-

>Close to canon, Remilia just got tired of being short. Since her smaller form suppressed her capabilities, it came back more potent than she remembered as her strength returned to her all at once, including her growth.

>Yeah that's it.

Touhou Project by ZUN & Team Shanghai Alice.

Character information referenced from here.
